name: ABot-AgentOS: A General Robotic Agent OS with Lifelong Multi-modal Memory

description: arXiv:2607.10350v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Recent VLM and VLA systems have improved robotic perception and action prediction, yet long-horizon embodied agents still require a general runtime layer for reasoning, memory, tool use, verification, and cross-embodiment execution. We present ABot-AgentOS, a general robotic Agent Operating System that sits above low-level controllers and prov...
